narrative:
Precinct New Phila 1-D (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 468 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.6%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.6 percentage points.
